site.title: Albert Lecomte — UI Designer
site.description: UI Designer based in Mulhouse, France. I create modern, accessible and high-performance websites for craftsmen, retailers and businesses in the region.
hero.name: Albert Lecomte
hero.title: UI Designer & Web Developer
hero.subtitle: I build high-converting websites for businesses in Mulhouse and Alsace.
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about design and the web
about.p1: UI Designer and web developer based in Mulhouse, I've been helping craftsmen, retailers and SMEs in the Alsace region build their online presence for over 5 years.
about.p2: My approach? Combining modern, professional design with fast, accessible and locally SEO-optimized websites.
about.p3: From Figma wireframe to live website, I manage the entire project to deliver a turnkey solution.
